Default Prove-Up.
Off Calendar Dec-13-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Commissioner Sue Kaplan, Clerk: Carla Amador & Sajja Ravinantapricha , CSR: Lavena Ward #7077 (Department 218)

Appearances
Attorney, Yvonne R. Mere, is present representing on behalf of the plaintiffs, City and County of San Francisco.
Plaintiff's witness, Laura Cook, is also present.

Defendant, Ronald Fortenberry, is not present.
(Default was entered on 1/31/07 as to the defendant)

This cause came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing. Laura Cook is sworn and testify.

After hearing the testimony and considering of the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant, Ronald Fortenberry, as follows:

Defendant shall pay plaintiff, civil penalties pursuant to Section 17206 of the California Business and Profession Code in the sum of $52,500.00, civil penalties pursuant to Section 11570 et seq. (The Drug Abatement Act) of the Health and Safety Code the sum of $25,000.00, attorney's fees in the amount of $13,197.75, and cost in the sum of $950.50, for a total Judgment of $91,648.25. Permanent Injuction and Judgment signed in open court.
